title: Agentic Workspace Repo Config
description: Repo-owned Agentic Workspace configuration stored in .agentic-workspace/config.toml.

schema_version.description: Config contract version. Workspace config files must set this to 1.

workspace.description: Repo-owned workspace policy for install presets, startup adapter shape, output posture, and advanced feature opt-ins.

default_preset.description: Default module preset used by lifecycle commands when no preset is supplied.

agent_instructions_file.description: Repo startup adapter text file agents should read first.

workflow_artifact_profile.description: Shape of generated workflow and handoff artifacts.

improvement_latitude.description: How much repo-directed improvement initiative Agentic Workspace may surface by default.

optimization_bias.description: Preferred rendering bias for durable outputs; this does not change canonical truth or execution method.

advanced_features.description: Explicit opt-ins for reusable diagnostics that are not ordinary startup requirements.

items.description: One entry in the advanced features list.

maintainer_mode.description: Opt in to package-maintainer dogfooding report routes during ordinary start/report use. Prefer config.local.toml when dogfooding the package from another repository.

cli_invoke.description: Repo-owned command prefix agents should use to invoke Agentic Workspace in this repository, such as a source-checkout or dev-dependency invocation. User-specific installs can still override this with .agentic-workspace/config.local.toml.

update.description: Module update-source policy for installed Agentic Workspace modules.

modules.description: Per-module update-source overrides. Omitted modules use product defaults.

planning.description: Update-source policy for the planning module.

memory.description: Update-source policy for the memory module.

workflow_obligations.description: Repo-local workflow obligations that reports can surface for matching work scopes.

^.+$.description: +$ referenced contract shape used by this contract.

system_intent.description: Repo-owned sources for durable product or project intent.

sources.description: Ordered candidate files that describe durable repo intent.

items.description: One entry in the sources list.

preferred_source.description: Preferred intent source, usually one of system_intent.sources.

assurance.description: Default trust and proof posture for work when active planning does not override it.

default_level.description: Baseline assurance level for proof and trust guidance.

agent_may_escalate.description: Whether agents may raise assurance level when risk or scope warrants it.

agent_may_deescalate.description: Whether agents may lower assurance level below the configured default.

strict_closeout.description: Whether closeout should block when required proof references or gates are missing.

decision_record_target.description: Path for durable decision records when work requires one; explicit config wins, but conventional ADR directories may be discovered when this is unset.

decision_record_format.description: Host-declared file format for durable decision records.

decision_record_template.description: Optional host template id or repo-relative template path for decision scaffolds.

decision_record_statuses.description: Optional accepted status values for decision records.

invariant_registry.description: Path to the repo invariant registry used during higher-assurance work.

risk_registry.description: Path to the repo risk registry used during higher-assurance work.

proof_profiles.description: Named proof profiles available to active planning assurance fields.

additionalProperties.description: Reusable command and review-aid set for a named proof profile.

required_commands.description: Commands that must pass for this proof profile.

items.description: One entry in the required commands list.

optional_commands.description: Commands that are useful but not required for this proof profile.

items.description: One entry in the optional commands list.

review_aids.description: Manual review aids or checklists associated with this proof profile.

items.description: One entry in the review aids list.

disallowed_commands.description: Commands that this proof profile disallows for the matched assurance concern.

items.description: One entry in the disallowed commands list.

requirements.description: Repo-declared assurance requirements that map work signals to authority refs, required evidence, proof profiles, review owners, and completion claim boundaries.

additionalProperties.description: One repo-defined assurance requirement. Domain meaning stays in repo-owned authority refs and free-form evidence labels.

level.description: Repo-interpreted assurance level for the matched requirement.

applies_to_paths.description: Path globs that activate this requirement when changed paths match.

applies_to_task_markers.description: Task-text markers that activate this requirement.

applies_to_planning_refs.description: Planning refs or requirement ids that activate this requirement from active planning state.

applies_to_proof_profiles.description: Active planning proof profile ids that activate this requirement.

applies_to_risk_refs.description: Risk registry refs that activate this requirement from active planning state.

applies_to_invariant_refs.description: Invariant refs that activate this requirement from active planning state.

authority_refs.description: Repo-owned docs, policies, runbooks, registries, or decision records agents should consult.

required_evidence.description: Free-form repo vocabulary naming evidence expected before supported completion claims.

proof_profile.description: Optional assurance.proof_profiles id to add when this requirement is active.

workflow_obligation_refs.description: Workflow obligation ids related to this requirement.

review_owner.description: Repo-local owner label for review or waiver decisions.

force.description: How strongly this requirement affects guidance and closeout claim gates.

blocking_claims.description: Completion option ids blocked while required evidence for this requirement is missing.

waiver.description: Recorded waiver with reason and owner for this requirement.

dismissal.description: Recorded dismissal or not-applicable decision with reason and owner for this requirement.

notes.description: Optional repo-local note about this requirement.

test_data_policy.description: Repo-specific policy for test data, privacy, fixtures, or generated samples.

cli_compatibility.description: Expected CLI identity and posture for commands executed in this repo.

enforcement.description: How strictly CLI compatibility expectations should be enforced.

minimum_version.description: Minimum accepted Agentic Workspace CLI version.

exact_version.description: Exact accepted Agentic Workspace CLI version when a repo must pin execution.

source_classes.description: Allowed source classes for the invoked CLI executable.

items.description: One entry in the source classes list.

target_relations.description: Allowed relation between the invoked CLI executable and the target repo.

items.description: One entry in the target relations list.

command.description: Expected CLI command string when the repo wants compatibility checks to match a specific invocation.

module_update_policy.description: Update source metadata for a managed module.

source_type.description: Where upgrade or install should resolve the module payload from.

source_ref.description: Git URL/ref or local path, depending on source_type.

source_label.description: Human-readable label for status and report output.

recommended_upgrade_after_days.description: Age threshold after which status or doctor may suggest checking for updates.

workflow_obligation.description: Repo-local workflow obligation that can be surfaced when stage and scope match current work.

stage.description: Workflow stage where this obligation matters.

force.description: How strongly a matched obligation affects the next action or closeout gate.

scope_tags.description: Tags used to match the obligation to touched work scopes.

items.description: One entry in the scope tags list.

commands.description: Commands to run or consider at the matching workflow stage.

items.description: One entry in the commands list.

review_hint.description: Short reminder to surface during review or closeout.

assurance_requirement_disposition.description: Recorded waiver or dismissal for a repo-declared assurance requirement.

reason.description: Why the requirement was waived, dismissed, or found not applicable.

owner.description: Repo-local owner or role accountable for the waiver or dismissal.
